title: Activate eSIM on iPhone with QR code
summary: Guide for activating a new or replacement iPhone with an eSIM QR code or manual SM-DP+ address entry.
symptoms: customer is moving from physical SIM to eSIM
camera cannot scan the QR code
activation says plan cannot be added
common_causes: old cellular plan is still installed
the QR code was already consumed
device is not connected to Wi-Fi during setup
the line is not ready for eSIM issuance
resolution_steps: Connect the iPhone to Wi-Fi before starting eSIM setup.
Remove inactive or duplicate cellular plans under Settings > Cellular.
Scan the QR code or use manual entry for SM-DP+ and activation code if scanning fails.
Wait up to 10 minutes for activation, then restart the phone once.
If activation is still pending, generate a fresh eSIM profile and resend the QR code.
escalation_policy: Escalate to activation support if multiple fresh QR codes fail on a supported, unlocked iPhone.
related_articles: Phone shows SOS only after SIM swap
Wi-Fi calling unavailable after handset upgrade

title: MMS messages fail on Android after APN changes
summary: Troubleshoot picture messages that stop sending or downloading on Android after APN edits, carrier switching apps, or device restores.
symptoms: text messages work but pictures fail
messages show downloading and never complete
group MMS messages do not arrive
common_causes: MMSC or MMS proxy fields are wrong
preferred APN switched to a non-carrier profile
resolution_steps: Confirm mobile data is on and the account includes data service.
Reset APN settings to carrier default values and remove duplicate APNs.
Turn off Wi-Fi temporarily and retry sending a small image.
Clear cache for the messaging app, then reboot the device.
If MMS still fails, test with the carrier messaging app and verify MMSC values from the support matrix.
escalation_policy: Escalate to device support if default APN values are correct and MMS fails across multiple messaging apps.
related_articles: Activate eSIM on iPhone with QR code
Short code and OTP texts are not arriving

title: Short code and OTP texts are not arriving
summary: Support article for customers who can receive normal SMS but do not receive one-time passwords, bank codes, or other short code traffic.
symptoms: marketing short codes work on another line but not this one
common_causes: line has spam blocking or parental controls enabled
short code was previously opted out with STOP
enterprise sender has not provisioned the number correctly
recent port-in has not fully propagated through aggregators
resolution_steps: Check account-level spam filters, parental controls, and message blocking features.
Ask the customer to text START or UNSTOP if the sender supports re-enrollment.
Verify whether the line was ported in within the last 72 hours.
Test with multiple known short code senders to isolate the issue.
If only one sender fails, advise the customer to contact the sender to verify short code enrollment and number formatting.
escalation_policy: Escalate to messaging operations only when the issue affects multiple short code providers after feature checks.
related_articles: MMS messages fail on Android after APN changes
Port-in delayed because account details do not match

title: Voicemail PIN reset for mobile subscribers
summary: Reset a forgotten voicemail PIN or fix a mailbox lockout after too many invalid passcode attempts.
symptoms: visual voicemail prompts for a passcode that no longer works
common_causes: line feature mismatch after plan migration
visual voicemail app cached an old password
resolution_steps: Reset the voicemail PIN from the account tools or the billing platform.
Have the customer dial into voicemail and set a new 4 to 7 digit PIN.
Force-close the visual voicemail app and refresh it after the new PIN is confirmed.
If voicemail greeting playback fails, reprovision the voicemail feature and wait 15 minutes.
Test visual voicemail sync once the mailbox is unlocked.
escalation_policy: Escalate to voice platform support if mailbox reprovisioning fails or greeting storage is corrupted.
related_articles: Wi-Fi calling unavailable after handset upgrade
International roaming enabled but data will not connect
